evaluation.corrective_action: PIP: She declined compared to the previous month, decreasing from 80% to 66.3%. Dr. Hossam will conduct additional follow-up to help improve performance and accelerate the process.
PIP: She declined compared to the previous month, decreasing from 82.4% to 44.6%. Dr. Hossam will conduct additional follow-up to help improve performance and accelerate the process.

Coaching: Dr. Adham Sameh conducted a strict 1-on-1 performance review with agent Radwa Ahmed due to a critical drop in her  - TEST_EDIToverall productivity to 48.9%. The operational data analysis revealed that while the agent maintains perfect shift-start attendance (fingerprint login at 08:00) , she spends nearly half of her actual working hours in idle/non-productive states (excessive AUX time).  Enforced Decision: She was placed on an immediate Performance Action Plan (PAP). Non-productive states are now capped at a maximum of 90 minutes per shift , with her overall productivity mandated to hit 85% by the end of the month , monitored through mandatory start/end shift check-ins.
